MIN1STRY OF .,ERSONNEL, PUB C GRIEVANCF.'l.AND PENSIONS (DepartmeiJt of Personnel and Traini/l~ NO'IlFICAllON ' New Delhi, 1he 171hFebruary, 20 G.S.R. 71(E).-Whereas in exercise 0 conferred upon 1he Central Government tmder S -section (2) of Section 4 of1heAdministrative Tribunals ct, 1985 (13 ofl985)arulon receiptofa request from ernmen! ofTamil Nadn In 1hisregard, 1he Tamil Nadn e Tnbunal was set up wi1h effect from 1he 51h D cember, 1986 vide Notification No, 1254(E) dated 1he 51h er, 1986publishedin1he Gazette ofIrulia, " Partll, Section 3, Sub-section (i); And whereas Government ofTamil Nadu proposal for abolition of Tamil Nadu Admi Tnbunal with 1he approvalof1he High CowtofJ at Madras for issnlng necessary notification; And whereas 1he High Court of Judicature Madras had vide 1heir cornmon order dated 1he 25th April 2005 in WPNos, 1724,2516,2517 arul5833 of2005 dir cted the Central Government to issne Notification aboli . g 1he Tribunal wi1hont waiting for any other fonnality; And whereas the Supreme Court while a Special leave Petition agalnst the said order has to grant a slay on 1he operation 1hereof, Now,1herefore, In compliance wi1h 1he ord of the High Court of Judicature at Madras, 1he Ta 'I Nadu Administrative Tribunal is hereby abolished wi1h' ediate effect and all 1he pendlng cases and records in e Tamil Nadn State Administrative Tribunal are directed t be sen! to 1he High Cowtof Judicalnre at Madras withln 0 weeks from the date of publication of1his Notification.
